features.name: class type parameter with static function accessing nested type via scope resolution
features.description: Code should include a class with a type parameter containing a static function that accesses a nested type through the type parameter using :: scope resolution operator

features.name: type parameter nested double scope resolution chain
features.description: Code should include a class with a type parameter where the static function accesses a nested type through a double scope resolution chain like T::Helper::Helper::getter()
